module_info.docstring: Shared utilities for Galiana analysis modules.

functions.name: iter_jsonl
functions.docstring: Load JSONL records; skip blank and invalid lines.

functions.name: normalize_title
functions.docstring: Normalize finding title to word set (lowercase, no punctuation).

functions.name: titles_match
functions.docstring:
Check if two titles match via word overlap.

Compares normalized word sets. Match if overlap / min(len) > threshold.
Used for fuzzy comparison of finding titles across eval runs.

Args:
    t1: First title
    t2: Second title
    threshold: Minimum overlap ratio (default 0.6)

Returns:
    True if titles match
